function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice from 20-03-2026 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH); it is attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Verified written outbox file mentally: recipient matches canonical entity email, attachment path is from a file read this run, subject quoting is YAML-safe, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, and no forwarded quoted text required. Proceeding to delete processed inbox item per workflow.
next_step.observation: The outbound draft was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.
